label: 1504 Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 97–164, title I, § 133(f)96 Stat. 41Apr. 2, 1982
notes: Section, , , directed that the Court of Claims have jurisdiction to review by appeal final judgments in the district courts in civil actions based on tort claims brought under if the notice of appeal filed in the district court had affixed to it a written consent on behalf of the appellees that the appeal be taken to the Court of Claims.act June 25, 1948, ch. 64662 Stat. 942section 1346(b) of this title
Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1982 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1982section 402 of Pub. L. 97–164section 171 of this title
